name: Rutter
description: Universal API for commerce, accounting, and payments platform integrations.

seo.title: Rutter — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Rutter: Universal API for commerce, accounting, and payments platform integrations.

when_to_use: Universal API for Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon selling channels
Accounting integrations: QuickBooks, Xero, NetSuite via one API
Commerce data normalization for lending and analytics platforms
Connecting financial data sources for embedded fintech apps
Replacing 10 separate integrations with one Rutter connection

pros: One API covers Shopify, QuickBooks, Amazon, Stripe
Normalized data models across accounting and commerce
Good webhooks and sandbox for fast prototyping
Saves months of per-platform integration work
cons: Per-connection pricing adds up quickly at scale
Deep platform-specific features often abstracted away
Smaller connector catalog than Merge or Codat
Rate limits inherited from underlying platforms
review.verdict: Practical unified API for fintech and commerce apps, but the abstraction tax bites when you need deep platform features.
review.best_for: B2B fintech and commerce SaaS needing fast multi-platform integrations
review.not_for: Apps requiring deep platform-specific flows or tight unit economics
